name: surp
description: SURP 2.0 — Sistema de Unidad de Resguardo Patrimonial (Forestal Arauco)

scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis azurite mailhog
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres
scripts.db:schema: for f in database/schema/*.sql; do docker exec -i surp-postgres psql -U postgres -d surp -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 < "$f"; done
scripts.db:seed: for f in database/seed/*.sql; do docker exec -i surp-postgres psql -U postgres -d surp -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 < "$f"; done
